title: Entry-Level Business Development Manager at Kolte-Patil Developers

jsonLd.title: Entry-Level Business Development Manager at Kolte-Patil Developers
jsonLd.description:
Kolte-Patil Developers has an exciting opening for a Business Development Manager at our Srinagar office. Join a company that values innovation, collaboration, and continuous learning.

About Kolte-Patil Developers:
Kolte-Patil Developers is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Coordinate with architects, contractors, and project teams
• Prepare presentations and proposals for institutional clients
• Negotiate pricing, terms, and conditions on behalf of clients
• Conduct land acquisition due diligence and feasibility studies
• Build relationships with channel partners and brokers
• Provide advisory services on property investment and market trends
• Maintain a pipeline of qualified leads using CRM software

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Chartered Accountant (ICAI)
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Investment Analysis
• Proficiency in Portfolio Management
• Proficiency in Title Search
• Proficiency in Property Valuation
• Proficiency in Negotiation Skills
• Proficiency in Contract Management
• Proficiency in Real Estate Law
• Proficiency in AutoCAD

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Flexible working hours
• Annual performance appraisal
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Srinagar, Jammu & Kashmir, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Kolte-Patil Developers!
